headline: 5 Stocks to Watch From Prospering Accident & Health Insurance Industry
summary: Accident and Health Insurance stocks like AFL, UNM, GL, TRUP and EIG are set to gain from rising underwriting exposure and accelerated digitalization. However, pricing pressure is a concern given rising medical costs and inflation.
